category_sources: Official JFlex manual describes JFlex as a lexical analyser generator for Java written in Java.
source_facts.description says JFlex is a lexical analyzer generator for Java.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is jflex; official site and manual use the styled name JFlex.
docs_sources: Official JFlex website provides the JFlex manual as the primary documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official manual documents scanner and lexical analyser generation.
source_facts.description identifies lexical analyzer generation for Java.
